title: matthiola incana subsp. rupestris
intro: Matthiola incana subsp. rupestris, also known as Rock Stock or Rock Stock Flower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Matthiola incana subsp. rupestris is often used as a dried herb or in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
